km.Cheshire, England: ឆeស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton是Ranulphus de Merton II和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II的兒子，出生。他和Mrs. Stephen de Merton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1271年之後在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton是Ranulphus de Merton II和Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II的儿子，出生。他和Mrs. Stephen de Merton至少有1个儿子。他去世于1271年之后在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Merton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Merton, such as found in Surrey, Kent, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with both Marton and Murton .

variants.name: Marton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Antal, Arpad, Geza, Andras, Bela, Denes, Endre, Gaza, Imre, Istvan, Janos.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called, principally in Lincolnshire, Warwickshire, and North Yorkshire, named in Old English as ‘settlement by a lake’ (from mere or mær ‘pool, lake’ + tūn ‘settlement’) or as ‘settlement by a boundary’ (from (ge)mære ‘boundary’ + tūn ‘settlement’). Compare Martin 2.
Hungarian (Márton): from the personal name Márton (see Martin 1). This surname is also found in Romania; see also 3 below.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton was born as the son of Ranulphus de Merton II and Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Stephen de Merton. He died after 1271, in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton est né, fils de Ranulphus de Merton II et Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Stephen de Merton. Il est décédé après 1271, à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton wurde, als Sohn von Ranulphus de Merton II und Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Stephen de Merton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1271 in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton è nato il come figlio di Ranulphus de Merton II e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Stephen de Merton. Morì dopo il 1271, nel Cheshire, England.

ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de MertonはRanulphus de Merton IIとMrs. Ranulphus de Merton IIの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Stephen de Mertonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1271年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton(은)는 Ranulphus de Merton II(와)과 Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Stephen de Merton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1271년 이후 영국 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton nasceu filho de Ranulphus de Merton II e Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Stephen de Merton. Ele faleceu após 1271, em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton родился. Его родителей звали Ranulphus de Merton II и Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Stephen de Merton. Он умер после 1271 г. в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Stephen de Merton nació como hijo de Ranulphus de Merton II y Mrs. Ranulphus de Merton II. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Stephen de Merton. Murió después de 1271, en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
